vehicles.slot: Software: touchscreen Service menu. No manual cable in passenger compartment.
shift: PREFERRED: Touchscreen — tap Gear icon or go to Service menu > Tow Mode to select N.
WITHOUT POWER: 12V battery is in the FRONT TRUNK (frunk) — open the front hood.
Connect jump pack to frunk 12V terminals (red+, black−).
Restore 12V power. Use touchscreen to select Neutral or Tow Mode.
NO manual override cable exists for the parking brake — requires power.
neutral: 12V battery in FRUNK — open front hood.
Connect jump pack to frunk 12V terminals ONLY.
Restore power. Use touchscreen Service menu to enable Tow Mode.
Tow Mode disengages parking brake and locks vehicle in Neutral.
NEVER touch the high-voltage battery. Orange cables = HV = LETHAL.
vehicles.notes: FLATBED ONLY. Tow Mode via touchscreen. 12V battery in frunk. NO manual parking brake override.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. NO manual parking brake override cable. 12V frunk only — NEVER touch orange HV cables.
vehicles.towMethod: FLATBED ONLY — quad motor or dual motor AWD electric drivetrain. Never tow with any wheels on ground.
towNotes: ELECTRIC VEHICLE — FLATBED ONLY without exception.
No manual parking brake cable — must have 12V power to release parking brake.
If parking brake cannot be released: lift rear wheels with skates/dollies to move vehicle.
12V frunk battery — very accessible once front hood is open.
Heavy vehicle (Class 2b) — verify flatbed GVWR capacity.

epb.override: Restore 12V via frunk terminals. Tow Mode on touchscreen releases EPB automatically. No manual cable override.
steps: Connect jump pack to 12V frunk terminals.
Touchscreen: Service > Tow Mode. EPB releases automatically.
If Tow Mode unavailable: lift rear wheels with skates to move vehicle.

airSuspension.description: Rivian air suspension with multiple ride heights. Camp Mode, All-Terrain, etc.
towingNotes: Use standard ride height for flatbed loading.
Suspension can lower vehicle at Access Mode — useful for ramp approach.

vehicles.steeringLock: Electronic steering lock — Tow Mode on touchscreen disengages it.

battery.location: FRUNK (front trunk, accessed by opening front hood)
battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. 12V frunk ONLY — never touch HV system. No manual parking brake override — must have power.

knownIssues.title: No Manual Parking Brake Override
knownIssues.detail: Unlike most vehicles, the Rivian R1T has NO manual parking brake release cable in the passenger compartment. The only way to release the parking brake is electronically via the touchscreen (with 12V power). If 12V is dead, restore from frunk terminals. If EPB still won't release, use wheel skates under rear wheels to move vehicle onto flatbed.

knownIssues.title: 12V Battery in Frunk — Very Accessible
knownIssues.detail: The 12V auxiliary battery is in the front trunk (frunk). Open the front hood — there is a storage compartment with the 12V battery and accessible jump terminals. This is straightforward to access but operators who haven't worked on Rivians may not know where to look.

knownIssues.title: Very Heavy — Class 2B Vehicle
knownIssues.detail: The R1T weighs approximately 7,148 lbs curb (GVWR 8,532 lbs), placing it in the same class as a Ford F-250/Ram 2500. Verify your flatbed's GVWR rating before attempting to load.

vehicles.slot: Software only — touchscreen Service menu or Gear icon. No manual override cable.
shift: PREFERRED: Touchscreen — Service > Tow Mode, or Gear icon > N.
WITHOUT POWER: Open front hood. Connect jump pack to frunk 12V terminals.
Restore power. Use touchscreen to select Tow Mode / Neutral.
No manual override cable in passenger compartment.
neutral: Open front hood. Connect jump pack to frunk 12V terminals.
Touchscreen: Service > Tow Mode. Parking brake releases, N engages.
FLATBED ONLY. NEVER touch orange HV cables.
vehicles.notes: Identical to R1T for towing purposes. FLATBED ONLY. Tow Mode required.
vehicles.warn: FLATBED ONLY. No manual EPB override. 12V frunk only.
towNotes: Use skates on rear if EPB cannot be released.

epb.override: Restore 12V from frunk. Tow Mode on touchscreen. No manual cable.
steps: If unavailable: skates on rear wheels.

airSuspension.description: Same air suspension system as R1T.

battery.warnings: FLATBED ONLY. 12V frunk only. No manual EPB override.

knownIssues.title: No Manual Parking Brake Override
knownIssues.detail: Same as R1T — no manual release cable. Must have 12V power for Tow Mode. If stuck, use wheel skates.

knownIssues.title: Very Heavy — Verify Flatbed Capacity
knownIssues.detail: R1S weighs approximately 7,000-7,148 lbs. Verify flatbed deck weight capacity before loading.
